dict.string: GigTax tracks your trips in the background to record all your miles — including deadhead miles Uber and Lyft don't count — so you get the maximum deduction.
GigTax uses your location to track trips and calculate accurate mileage deductions.
GigTax tracks your trips in the background to record all your miles — including deadhead miles Uber and Lyft don't count — so you get the maximum deduction.
GigTax uses your camera to photograph receipts for expense tracking.
